howItWorks.intro: This creatine dosage calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Loading: 0.3g per kg bodyweight for 5-7 days
howItWorks.outro: Individual results vary based on metabolism, genetics, and activity level. Consult your doctor before starting any program.

faq.question: What is creatine?
faq.answer: The most researched sports supplement. Creatine monohydrate increases phosphocreatine stores in muscles, improving high-intensity exercise performance by 10-20%. It is safe for long-term use.

faq.question: Do I need a loading phase?
faq.answer: Loading (0.3g/kg for 5-7 days) saturates muscles faster. Maintenance-only (0.05g/kg daily) works too but takes 3-4 weeks to fully saturate. Both reach the same endpoint.

faq.question: When should I take creatine?
faq.answer: Timing is not critical. Taking it with food improves absorption slightly. Post-workout with protein and carbs is popular but not required.

faq.question: Does creatine cause water retention?
faq.answer: Initial weight gain of 2-4 lbs is normal from intracellular water retention. This is not bloating — the water is inside muscle cells, which is beneficial.

faq.question: Is the Creatine Dosage Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Creatine Dosage Calculator?
sections.body: The Creatine Dosage Calculator is a free online tool designed for athletes and fitness enthusiasts who need quick, accurate calculations in the fitness and training space. By entering your weight, phase, you get instant results including daily dose, best timing, water intake. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting daily dose right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In fitness and training, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by athletes and fitness enthusiasts worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to optimize your training with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your weight and need to find the right daily dose. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Weight (lbs)
howToSteps.description: Type or select your weight in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Phase (1=Loading 2=Maintenance)
howToSteps.description: Type or select your phase in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your daily dose, best timing, water intake. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your weight before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
